finding: Raw email body reaches the provider with no LLMInputSanitizer gate
evidence: messages includes email.bodyText verbatim before complete(_:)
fix: Route email.bodyText through LLMInputSanitizer before assembling messages (co-locate with existing inline validators; not AISafetyPipeline — unshipped)

finding: System prompt is an inline string literal outside PromptRegistry
evidence: let system = "You are a helpful email assistant..."
fix: Move the prompt into PromptRegistry (versioned); leave only a resolveBody(id:fallback:) reference

finding: Calendar-delete tool handler does not scope by account before mutating
evidence: execute(_:) deletes by eventId without verifyEmailOwnership / uiContext.accountEmail
fix: Gate the handler on verifyEmailOwnership(context.uiContext.accountEmail) before the delete
